columnMapping._description: Maps UConn CT Crash Data Repository fields to CRASH LENS field codes
columnMapping._note: IMPORTANT: tusz-n3pv on data.ct.gov is an external link to ctcrash.uconn.edu, NOT a direct Socrata table. Actual data served via UConn ArcGIS at gis.cti.uconn.edu. Field names from ArcGIS FeatureServer (PascalCase). CT uses Town (not County) as primary geographic unit. MMUCC 5th Edition compliant.

derivedFields._description: Fields computed from raw data during Stage 1 (CONVERT)

SEVERITY._note: CT provides MostSevereInjury directly in KABCO: K=Fatal, A=Suspected Serious, B=Suspected Minor, C=Possible, O=No Apparent. Also CrashSeverity for overall crash classification.

LAT_LON._note: ArcGIS layers store coordinates in point geometry (WKID 4326 WGS84). Extract lat/lon from geometry field.

roadSystems._description: Connecticut road classification for road-type filtering

crashTypeMapping._description: Maps Connecticut collision type values to CRASH LENS standard
crashTypeMapping._note: Update with actual state values from data dictionary

dataSource.name: UConn CT Crash Data Repository
dataSource._apiUrlNote: tusz-n3pv on data.ct.gov is an EXTERNAL LINK to ctcrash.uconn.edu, not a queryable Socrata dataset. Use UConn ArcGIS REST services instead.
dataSource.fileFormat: GeoJSON/CSV (ArcGIS REST + CSV export from ctcrash.uconn.edu)
dataSource.dataDictionary: UConn CTSRC: https://www.ctcrash.uconn.edu/docs/Repository%20Users%20Guide.pdf, Code Values: https://gis.cti.uconn.edu/software/Crash_Coded_Values.xlsx, MMUCC mapping: portal.ct.gov/dot
dataSource._csvExportNote: CSV exports from ctcrash.uconn.edu produce 4 tables: Crashes, Vehicles, Persons, Trailers. Requires free registration.
